subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy spiritual letter with its celestial meanings hath reached me and its contents are understood and clear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه روحانی آنجناب با معانی رحمانی واصل و مفهوم و معلوم شد
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @the power of words; of speech, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
